title: Ingest HTML structure
content:
研究综述

本案例用于评估 HTML 到 Markdown 的还原质量。

结论

需要保留标题层级和段落结构。

title: Ingest pasted text
content:
# Pasted Note

NotebookLM 应支持直接粘贴内容并完成标准化、分块和索引。

## 关键要求

- 保持结构
- 避免丢段落
- 提供可检索块

title: Ingest long markdown
content:
# Long Markdown

LangChain supports agents, retrieval, tools, and memory for production notebooks.

## Section A

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

A robust ingest system should preserve structure, preserve headings, and keep semantic context in each chunk. In research workflows, a single source is often reused for search, summary, and grounded chat, so parsing quality directly affects downstream answer quality. Reliable chunk boundaries reduce retrieval drift and improve citation precision.

## Section B

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

Notebook research requires stable normalization, deterministic markdown output, and predictable indexing behavior. Without stable normalization, repeated ingest of the same article can produce inconsistent outlines and inconsistent retrieval chunks. This weakens ranking and causes poor user trust in recommendations and citations.

## Section C

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

Evaluation should capture parse quality, chunk coherence, and indexing health with explicit metrics. Practical metrics include parse success rate, markdown length, heading fidelity, chunk count, chunk token distribution, and embedding coverage. These metrics should be stable across reruns and resistant to noisy provider responses.

## Section D

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

When documents are long, map-reduce summarization and retrieval-aware chunking can reduce latency and improve answer quality. However, excessive compression can remove key evidence. A balanced design retains important sections, keeps source traceability, and records enough metadata for downstream re-ranking.

## Section E

Well-structured markdown improves summary quality, chat grounding quality, and source recommendation quality. In production systems, the ingest layer is not only a parser but also a quality gate that protects every downstream feature.

Well-structured markdown improves summary quality, chat grounding quality, and source recommendation quality. In production systems, the ingest layer is not only a parser but also a quality gate that protects every downstream feature.

title: Ingest plain text without headings
content:
第一部分介绍背景。这里没有 markdown 标题，但内容依然应该被标准化并可切块。

第二部分给出方法细节，包括数据来源、实验设置与约束。

第三部分总结结论，强调 ingest 结果要可检索、可用于后续摘要与问答。
